description: CycleA basedOn CycleB, CycleB basedOn CycleA. Tests cycle detection: code should not infinite loop and should resolve properties from each style's own definitions.

expected.para_1: font_size=24, bold=on (CycleA), color=0000FF (CycleB, before cycle stops)
expected.para_2: color=0000FF (CycleB), font_size=24, bold=on (CycleA, before cycle stops)
